parameters.query: SELECT v.id, v.visitor_id, v.first_seen, v.last_seen FROM visitors v WHERE v.tenant_id = {{ $json.body.tenant_id }} AND (v.visitor_id = '{{ $json.body.customer_id }}' OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM touchpoints t WHERE t.visitor_id = v.id AND t.metadata->>'email' = '{{ $json.body.customer_email }}'))

SELECT event_type, page_title, source, medium, campaign, referrer, device, timestamp FROM touchpoints WHERE visitor_id = {{ $json.id }} AND tenant_id = {{ $json.body.tenant_id }} ORDER BY timestamp ASC

parameters.content:
## Attribution Engine

Webhook trigger on new order or API call.
1. Receives tenant_id + order data
2. Finds visitor by email/customer_id
3. Retrieves all touchpoints ordered by timestamp
4. Builds journey: First touch -> ... -> Purchase
5. Calculates time_to_convert, channels touched
6. First-touch attribution model
